title: Chinook 数据库中哪些艺术家最受欢迎？分析他们的专辑数、总曲目数和平均曲目时长。
description: Chinook 数据库中哪些艺术家最受欢迎？分析他们的专辑数、总曲目数和平均曲目时长。

steps.description: 查询所有艺术家及其专辑数量
steps.sql: SELECT ar.Name AS 艺术家, COUNT(al.AlbumId) AS 专辑数 FROM Artist ar LEFT JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY 专辑数 DESC LIMIT 10
steps.result_summary: [('Iron Maiden', 21), ('Led Zeppelin', 14), ('Deep Purple', 11), ('Metallica', 10), ('U2', 10), ('Ozzy Osbourne', 6), ('Pearl Jam', 5), ('Various Artists', 4), ('Faith No More', 4), ('Foo Fighters', 4

steps.description: 统计专辑数量最多的艺术家的总曲目数
steps.sql: SELECT ar.Name AS 艺术家, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS 总曲目数 FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY 总曲目数 DESC LIMIT 5

steps.description: 查找这些热门艺术家的平均曲目时长（毫秒转分钟）
steps.sql: SELECT ar.Name AS 艺术家, ROUND(AVG(t.Milliseconds) / 60000.0, 2) AS 平均时长_分钟 FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId ORDER BY 平均时长_分钟 DESC LIMIT 5
